sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2021-05-15');
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (2, DATE '2023-11-10');
SELECT id, last_day(event_date) AS last_day_of_month FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = last_day(event_date) WHERE id = 1;
